case_title: PHILIPPINE CENTER MANAGEMENT BOARD, INC. VS. PANACHE DESTINATION MANAGEMENT ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 67166759) AS TO DEFENDANT PANACHE DESTINATION MANAGEMENT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PHILIPPINE CENTER MANAGEMENT BOARD, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PANACHE DESTINATION MANAGEMENT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 445-447 SUTTER STREET SUITE 423, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94108, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 67166759)
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE ***$21.00/DAY*** (TRANSACTION ID # 67166759) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHILIPPINE CENTER MANAGEMENT BOARD, INC.

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT ***FOLLOWING PARTIES ONLY; DOES 1-10 INCLUSIVE, AND ALL OCCUPANTS IN POSSESSION (TRANSACTION ID # 67166759) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE, AND ALL OCCUPANTS IN POSSESSION

UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (COMMERCIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHILIPPINE CENTER MANAGEMENT BOARD, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PANACHE DESTINATION MANAGEMENT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE, AND ALL OCCUPANTS IN POSSESSION

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHILIPPINE CENTER MANAGEMENT BOARD, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PANACHE DESTINATION MANAGEMENT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE, AND ALL OCCUPANTS IN POSSESSION NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PHILIPPINE CENTER MANAGEMENT BOARD, INC.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 67071474) AS TO DEFENDANT PANACHE DESTINATION MANAGEMENT

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 67071474), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHILIPPINE CENTER MANAGEMENT BOARD, INC. SERVED OCT-26-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PANACHE DESTINATION MANAGEMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PANACHE DESTINATION MANAGEMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT PANACHE DESTINATION MANAGEMENT
